name: Galbrena
description: Once a Septimontian known as "Angel", she is now a formidable "Discord Slayer" who wields the ability to consume the frequencies and powers of Tacet Discords she hunts across Solaris-3, with the aid of the notorious Chimera. Her identity as a "Fiend of Ever-Burning Flame", a huntress spoken in legend corrupted by the Dark Tide, is now reborn anew with her responsibilities as a Consultant of the Black Shores.
